thought:
The user wants me to read three files sequentially - a.txt, b.txt, and c.txt - one at a time, waiting for each result before the next. Then report only the total number of lines across all three files...a.txt has 3 lines. Now read b.txt.b.txt has 5 lines. Now read c.txt.a.txt: 3 lines
b.txt: 5 lines
